options.name: --size-format
options.description:
short | +short | WIDTH
e.g --size-format +short
--excl -x  EXCL-WILD[,EXCL-WILD ..]
e.g. -x *.tmp;*.temp
--excl-dir -X  EXCL-WILD[,EXCL-WILD ..]
--sort -o  off | name | size | date | ext | count | last
e.g. -o size

options.name: --sum
options.description:
ext | dir | +dir | year
--within -w  SIZE | DATE
e.g. -w 100m -w 30day
--not-within -W  SIZE | DATE
e.g. -W 10k -W 3day
e.g. -w 14day -W +7day
Frequently used shortcuts:

options.name: -R
options.description:
=> --dir tree
Scan all sub dir -s  => --sub all
Brief path name  -b  => --total off --hide date,size,count,mode,owner,link
Dir only         -d  => --dir only
File only        -f  => --dir off
https://github.com/ck-yung/dir2cs/blob/main/docs/HELP.md
